name: aurora-ui
description: High-end animated React component library for Next.js (copy-paste + CLI).

components.title: Accordion
components.description: Animated disclosure panels for compact FAQ and settings layouts.
components.usageExample:
<Accordion
  items={[
    { id: "1", title: "Question?", content: "Answer here." },
    { id: "2", title: "Another?", content: "More details." },
  ]}
/>
components.agentInstructions:
1. Run: npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add accordion
2. Install printed peer dependencies with npm install
3. Ensure lib/utils.ts exists (CLI creates it) and @/* alias is configured
4. Copy theme CSS variables from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/app/globals.css into your globals.css
5. Ensure tailwind.config content includes ./components/**/*.{ts,tsx}
6. Add "use client" at the top of any file that renders <Accordion>
8. Required packages: clsx, tailwind-merge
9. Use exactly this JSX (do not invent props):
<Accordion
  items={[
    { id: "1", title: "Question?", content: "Answer here." },
    { id: "2", title: "Another?", content: "More details." },
  ]}
/>
